block_00: Let’s congratulate the winners together. Jump in!
block_06: The first IQ Option Social Trading Cup has come to an end. The trading adventure lasted for a month and a half and we’re glad to name the three strongest countries of the entire competition.
block_14: Though this trading adventure has ended, we still have lots of trading tournaments to offer. Without a doubt, participating in tournaments is a great way to sharpen your trading skills as well as to engage with the global IQ Option trading community. Check the
block_16: on the website and see for yourself!
block_18: We are always adding more interesting tournaments — stay tuned!
